title: Formatting Names with Titles
scenario: Write a Python function to format a full name with a title. The function should take two arguments: 'first_name' and 'title'. The title should be capitalized and followed by a period. The output should be in the format 'Mr./Ms./Mrs./Dr. John Smith'.
constraints: Must use a Python function definition

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function uses a Python function definition and string concatenation.
Verify that the function has correct Python syntax.
Check if the function correctly formats the name with the title.
